expectations.text: Produces a structured severity-graded readiness report despite no explicit phrase
Identifies the blank Postgres datasource password as a critical config finding
expectations.evidence: C1 'Database has a blank password' at application.properties:3-5.

expectations.text: Identifies the unguarded stock oversell race in OrderService.create as a critical concurrency finding
expectations.evidence: C2 'Stock oversell race condition' at OrderService.java:93-100.

expectations.text: Lays out what to fix first, ordered by severity
expectations.evidence: 'Suggested fix order: 1. C1 -> 2. C2 -> 3. C3 -> then W1-W4'.

expectations.text: Every finding cites a concrete file:line location
expectations.evidence: Criticals cite lines, but W4 (actuator) and parts of C3 (auth) reference files/pom.xml without line numbers.

expectations.text: Does NOT wrongly flag ddl-auto=validate as a production risk
expectations.evidence: W1 explicitly notes 'ddl-auto=validate on line 7 is the correct, safe choice — good.'
